title: Can-Can
writer: Dorothy Kingsley, Charles Lederer, Abe Burrows
actors: Frank Sinatra, Shirley MacLaine, Maurice Chevalier
plot: In 1896 Paris, a female nightclub proprietor fights against the forces of public morality for the right to feature her performers doing the risqué dance, the Can-Can.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 5 wins & 7 nominations total
